things.name: Djemaa el-Fna Square
things.description: UNESCO Living Heritage - the world's greatest spectacle at sunset with snake charmers, musicians and food stalls

things.name: Souks of Marrakech
things.description: Labyrinthine souks of the medina - leather tanners, spice sellers, carpet weavers and silversmiths

things.name: Bahia Palace
things.description: Late 19th-century palace with carved plasterwork, mosaic floors and cedarwood ceilings

things.name: Majorelle Garden (Yves Saint Laurent)
things.description: Cobalt blue garden designed by painter Jacques Majorelle, owned by Yves Saint Laurent

things.name: Koutoubia Mosque
things.description: Marrakech's most important mosque with a 70m minaret visible across the city

things.name: Ben Youssef Medersa
things.description: 14th-century Quranic school with the most beautiful Islamic architecture in Marrakech

things.name: Saadian Tombs
things.description: 16th-century royal necropolis sealed by Sultan Moulay Ismail and rediscovered in 1917

things.name: Hammam Experience
things.description: Traditional Moroccan steam bath with a kessa exfoliation and argan oil massage

things.name: Atlas Mountains Day Trip
things.description: Berber villages, cedar forests and mountain hiking 1 hour from Marrakech

things.name: Riad Dinner
things.description: Dinner in a traditional Moroccan courtyard house with tagine, bastilla and mint tea
